channel.title: Reviews in the Neurosciences
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Reviews in the Neurosciences

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Eng Han How, Shar-Maine Chin, Chuin Hau Teo, Ishwar S. Parhar, Tomoko Soga DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revneuro-2024-frontmatter8

item.title: Role of endothelial glycocalyx in central nervous system diseases and evaluation of the targeted therapeutic strategies for its protection: a review of clinical and experimental data
item.description: Article by Eng Han How, Shar-Maine Chin, Chuin Hau Teo, Ishwar S. Parhar, Tomoko Soga DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revneuro-2024-0039

item.title: Research progress on astrocyte-derived extracellular vesicles in the pathogenesis and treatment of neurodegenerative diseases
item.description: Article by Eng Han How, Shar-Maine Chin, Chuin Hau Teo, Ishwar S. Parhar, Tomoko Soga DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revneuro-2024-0043

item.title: The role of antibodies in small fiber neuropathy: a review of currently available evidence
item.description: Article by Eng Han How, Shar-Maine Chin, Chuin Hau Teo, Ishwar S. Parhar, Tomoko Soga DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revneuro-2024-0027

item.title: Revealing the mechanisms of blood–brain barrier in chronic neurodegenerative disease: an opportunity for therapeutic intervention
item.description: Article by Eng Han How, Shar-Maine Chin, Chuin Hau Teo, Ishwar S. Parhar, Tomoko Soga DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revneuro-2024-0040

item.title: Current potential diagnostic biomarkers of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis
item.description: Article by Eng Han How, Shar-Maine Chin, Chuin Hau Teo, Ishwar S. Parhar, Tomoko Soga DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revneuro-2024-0037

item.title: The neurobiological mechanisms of photoperiod impact on brain functions: a comprehensive review
item.description: Article by Eng Han How, Shar-Maine Chin, Chuin Hau Teo, Ishwar S. Parhar, Tomoko Soga DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revneuro-2024-0006

item.title: Accelerated biological brain aging in major depressive disorder
item.description: Article by Eng Han How, Shar-Maine Chin, Chuin Hau Teo, Ishwar S. Parhar, Tomoko Soga DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revneuro-2024-0025
